version_pin_rationale: libjson-c 0.15-3~ubuntu1.22.04.2 is the jammy security-pocket build (CVE updates). THIS WAS THE CASCADE-E ROOT CAUSE: swaymsg DT_NEEDED libjson-c.so.5 but neither the R9 from-source initramfs (which ships only libc/libm/libcap/libpcre2-8/libudev/libcrypt) nor any DE0-G / DE-H1 catalog supplied it. The previous DE-H2 VM run aborted with 'swaymsg: error while loading shared libraries: libjson-c.so.5: cannot open shared object file'. sway 1.7 also links libjson-c.so.5 for its IPC protocol marshalling. No transitive deps beyond libc.
